ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cruises" (
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cruise */,
  "cruise_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier for the cruise */,
  "principal_scientist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal scientist leading the cruise */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the cruise */,
  "duration_days" INTEGER /* Duration of the cruise in days */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the cruise */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the cruise */,
  "aim" TEXT /* Primary objectives or aims of the cruise */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the cruise */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Total budget allocated for the cruise */,
  "current_cost" TEXT /* Current cost incurred for the cruise */,
  "vessel_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vessel used for the cruise */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number for tracking changes in cruise plans */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cruises_principal_scientist_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_scientist_id") REFERENCES scientists ("scientist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scientists" (
  "scientist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scientist */,
  "scientist_name" TEXT /* Full name of the scientist */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution or organization the scientist belongs to */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the scientist */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the scientist (e.g., Principal Investigator, Crew Member) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the scientist */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Field of specialization of the scientist */,
  "cruise_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of cruise IDs the scientist has participated in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scientist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise the activity belongs to */,
  "scientist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scientist who conducted the activity */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date the activity was conducted */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the activity */,
  "issues" TEXT /* Any issues or problems encountered during the activity */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the activity */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the activity */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* JSON object for the geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) where the activity took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_activities_scientist_id FOREIGN KEY ("scientist_id") REFERENCES scientists ("scientist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., Winch, AUV, Sensor) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the equipment used */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise the equipment is associated with */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the equipment */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration */,
  "maintenance_log" TEXT /* JSON array of maintenance activities and dates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise the data is associated with */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., Temperature, Salinity, Depth) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the data collected */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the data was collected */,
  "location" TEXT /* JSON object for the geographical coordinates (latitude, longitude) where the data was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "cruise_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cruise the report belongs to */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Scientific, Safety, Financial) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the report was uploaded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or summary of the report */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., Draft, Final, Approved) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date the report was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_cruise_id FOREIGN KEY ("cruise_id") REFERENCES cruises ("cruise_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Researcher, Admin, Crew Member) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level (e.g., Read, Write, Admin) */,
  "cruise_ids" TEXT /* JSON array of cruise IDs the user has access to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
